_meta.purpose: Global site configuration. Single source of truth for brand, base URL, navigation, and footer. Read by the (future) generator and used to keep every page's <head>, nav, and footer consistent.
_meta.baseUrlNote: PROVISIONAL. Confirm the real production domain. Canonicals/og:url/sitemap are built from baseUrl and MUST stay extensionless (Cloudflare strips .html via 308). Change in one place here.

_modeNote: Homepage gate. 'coming-soon' copies coming-soon.html to index.html (public splash); 'live' copies preview.html (the full site) to index.html. Change this one word and run tools/generate.py to launch or revert.

brand.name: 3D GRIT
brand.description: A modular auto-rigging and pipeline toolkit for Blender, built by artists who ship. Rigging, Maya-muscle-memory bridges, retopology, and a feed of the most interesting work happening where 3D meets AI.

footer.blurb: Professional auto-rigging and pipeline tools for independent creators and studios. Built for Blender artists, by Blender artists.
footer.legal: © 2026 3D GRIT, a PixelStortion studio. All rights reserved.
